name: Nobody Hurts a Friend of Mine!!!!

issues.description: PowerBoost target should specify 'up to 1' with maxTargets constraint; currently uses ChooseOpponentCharacter without limit

Second DrawCard action is conditional on 'if your opponent has a Character with 5000 or more power' but no condition object attached; needs conditional wrapper or separate effect with HasCardOnBoard condition
Second effect has trigger 'Trigger' with no condition and orphaned DrawCard action; appears to be malformed duplicate of conditional draw
